appliedUpdates.description: Added 'Flow Validator Guidance: QEMU Framebuffer' section with isolation rules (unique socket/log/screenshot paths per flow), QEMU launch templates for standard and hi-res, keystroke/screenshot templates, cleanup templates, and shared resource boundaries

notes: 2 of 3 flow validator subagents failed due to QEMU test.img file lock conflicts when running in parallel. The display-pipeline flow completed successfully via subagent. Font-quality and resolution flows were tested directly by the validator. All 8 assertions passed on first attempt across unit tests, code review, and visual QEMU screenshots at 1024x768, 1280x800, and 1920x1080 resolutions.
